General.Name: Foxx Development Holdings Inc.
General.Description: Foxx Development Holdings Inc. engages in the sales of electronic products in the United States. The company offers smartphones, tablets, wearables, and other communication terminals under the Foxx brand. It also provides after-sales support services; and water leak detectors. The company serves third-party distributors, as well as sells through e-commerce platform. Foxx Development Holdings Inc. was founded in 2017 and is headquartered in Irvine, California.
General.Address: 15375 Barranca Parkway, Irvine, CA, United States, 92618
